summary: Include saved stars/settings/stages as saved-mode ownership sources so type candidates are not limited to explicit ownership arrays only.
rootCause: The saved-mode index used explicit saves[].generals and saves[].equipments as the primary ownership source. User save data can also contain configured generals/equipment via generalStars, generalSettings, inheritedSkills, equipmentStars, and equipmentStages; those configured items were treated as not owned and were excluded from type candidates.
externalizationDecision: No HTML changes; the ownership-source fix is in existing external JavaScript and a validation tool.
userPasteDataIfStillLow: Current save export JSON fields: saves[].generals, saves[].generalStars, saves[].generalSettings, saves[].inheritedSkills, saves[].equipments, saves[].equipmentStars, saves[].equipmentStages
Selected purpose/type and candidate counts by role tab
